result.markdown:
---
title: "Quality & Scrap Analytics"
subtitle: "Cross-system pattern analysis — Sheet Metal Fabricator, Elizabeth NJ"
---


## About This Case

This report presents a cross-system quality and scrap analysis for a custom sheet
metal fabricator operating in Elizabeth, NJ. The analysis spans 36 months of
production data (January 2022 – December 2024) across five source systems: ERP,
MES, QMS, Materials/WMS, and HR.

**The central finding:** four distinct quality patterns are embedded in the data
that are only discoverable by joining across systems. Each pattern was invisible
in any single source system but becomes clear once the data is connected.

| Pattern | Dimension | Defect Rate Multiplier |
|---------|-----------|----------------------|
| P1 | Press Brake × Shift B | 3.4× fleet average |
| P2 | Supplier C thin-gauge material | 1.9× fleet average |
| P3 | High-complexity parts | 1.6× fleet average |
| P4 | Operator with lapsed welding cert | 2.2× fleet average |

---
